<update_bead>
<bead id="ddx-0b382233">
  <title>agent/test + cmd/test: migrate remaining ExecuteBeadOptions sites</title>
  <description>
Stage 3 of SD-024. Mechanical migration of any remaining sites.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_e2e_test.go
- Any cmd/ test file constructing ExecuteBeadOptions
  </description>
  <acceptance>
rg 'ExecuteBeadOptions\\{' cli/ returns 0 matches outside the type definition about to be retired. cd cli && go test ./... passes.
  </acceptance>
  <notes>
REVIEW:BLOCK

**Production sites not migrated** — `cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go:1738` and `cli/internal/server/workers.go:586` still construct `agent.ExecuteBeadOptions{...}`. SD-024's "all three dispatch sites must migrate together" principle plus this AC require these to move to `ExecuteBeadWithConfig` + `ExecuteBeadRuntime`.
**Test sites not migrated** — `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_artifacts_test.go` (6 occurrences), `execute_bead_checkpoint_test.go` (2), `execute_bead_env_isolation_test.go` (1), `execute_bead_commit_test.go` (_bead_
